text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Fwahaha! They really know how to<n>replicate
everyone's unique<n>cuteness!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Just look how adorable this plushie<n>is.
Umamusume are like actual<n>miracles, aren't they?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Oh, that I can live in the same<n>universe as them...
I've discovered<n>what it means to be happy all
over<n>again!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: And it's all thanks to you! ♪
